title: chore(deps): bump langsmith from 0.3.81 to 0.4.6

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: Fix LangSmith exporter flush to drain pending trace batches

summary: Dependabot PR bumping langsmith from 0.3.81 to 0.4.6 in the @mastra/langsmith observability package. Changes the dependency specifier from >=0.3.79 to >=0.4.6 in observability/langsmith/package.json, plus lockfile updates. The 0.3→0.4 bump is a minor version change in 0.x semver which can include breaking changes. The lockfile diff also shows collateral resolution changes (braintrust resolving against zod@4.3.6 instead of zod@3.25.76, removal of p-retry dependency from langsmith).
maintainerNotes: CI is failing: Build and Validate build outputs fail, cascading to Agent Builder, Core, MCP, Observability, and RAG test failures. Memory, E2E, and Full Test Suite are pending/blocked on the build. The 0.3→0.4 version bump may introduce breaking API changes that need verification — the lockfile shows p-retry was dropped from langsmith's dependencies. The minimum specifier change from >=0.3.79 to >=0.4.6 is also a breaking change for downstream consumers who may be on langsmith 0.3.x. A maintainer should verify the langsmith 0.4.x API is compatible, fix the build failure, and consider whether the minimum version floor should be more permissive (e.g., >=0.3.79 || >=0.4.0).
